doors.door: Run academic literature review and paper-output workflows with Aut Sci Write
doors.browse_use: literature, research, scraping, knowledge synthesis, cited research packets
doors.input_contract_hint: repo docs, source links, category indexes, user-provided context
doors.output_artifact_hint: matched router surface and expansion plan
doors.human_review_boundary: required before final action or conclusion
doors.safety_boundary: must not make legal, medical, engineering, compliance, or safety conclusions without human review

doors.browse_use: literature, research, scraping, knowledge synthesis, cited research packets
doors.input_contract_hint: repo docs, source links, category indexes, user-provided context
doors.output_artifact_hint: matched router surface and expansion plan
doors.human_review_boundary: optional unless output affects a person or external system
doors.safety_boundary: keep as reference pattern until copied into an ECC contract

doors.browse_use: execution/runtime inspiration only; translate useful patterns back into Codex/ECC
doors.input_contract_hint: event trigger, app credentials, records, message/document source
doors.output_artifact_hint: automation run, notification, transformed record, queued task
doors.safety_boundary: do not treat runtime platform as Codex architecture unless explicitly chosen
